title: 9 Things a Godly Man Does First So No One Else Has To
caption:
Leadership doesn't start with a title. It starts with the parts of the job no one else wants.

Christ went first into the cost and never needed the applause for it. That's the pattern, not a corner office and a title on a door.

9 things a godly man does first, so no one else has to:

1. He takes the boring shift.
2. He apologizes before he's asked to.
3. He says the hard thing in the room, not after it.
4. He eats last.
5. He tells the truth when a lie would be easier for everyone, including him.
6. He shows up to the hospital room, the move, the funeral.
7. He owns the mistake before anyone traces it back to him.
8. He forgives first, even when he's owed the apology.
9. He carries the weight quietly and lets someone else get the credit.

Which one are you already doing? Which one are you waiting to be asked to do? Save this for the next time you're tempted to wait for permission.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #godlymen #manofgod #servantleadership #christianity
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
